observation: I can see a sign-up form with the email field already filled with 'ai.test.user@example.com'. There's a password field below it that needs to be filled. I can see the password label and should be able to input a password into the corresponding input field.
reasoning: As a normal user completing the sign-up process, I need to fill in the password field next since the email is already entered. This is the logical next step in the registration flow.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The signup form completely disappeared and was replaced with a different page showing 'Specter.AI' branding and a 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner. The email input field with 'ai.test.user@example.com' and password field are no longer visible.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: Password input action caused an unexpected page navigation or state change instead of progressing the sign-up flow. The form should have remained visible with the password field populated.
